disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long history (~15 years) of frequent burning retrosternal discomfort self-managed with over-the-counter antacids
trigger_question_examples: How long have you had this kind of discomfort?
Have you had heartburn or reflux before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had bad heartburn for about 15 years — I just take antacid tablets when it flares up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Over the past ~4 weeks solid foods (bread, meat) have increasingly caught or stuck on the way down, and this has been getting worse
trigger_question_examples: Has swallowing changed for you recently?
Does food ever catch or stick when you swallow?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, over the last month or so food has started catching when I swallow — bread and meat especially — and it's been getting worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Tonight a piece of meat feels lodged in the lower chest and will not pass; sips of water and everything swallowed are regurgitated straight back up
trigger_question_examples: Can you swallow fluids at all right now?
What happens when you try to drink water?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The meat is stuck and won't go down. When I sip water it just comes straight back up — I can't keep anything down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Currently able to swallow own saliva without drooling; small amounts of clear saliva are being spat out but there is no pooling or overflow of secretions
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to swallow your own saliva?
Are you drooling or unable to manage your spit?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can still swallow my own spit — I'm not drooling. It's just food and water that won't go down.
I've had a dry cough at night for a long time, especially when I lie down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No vomiting of blood, no black or tarry stools, and no unintentional weight loss noticed
trigger_question_examples: Have you vomited any blood or seen black tarry stools?
Have you lost weight without trying?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't vomited any blood or seen black stools, and I don't think I've lost weight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No sudden severe tearing chest or back pain, and no difficulty breathing
trigger_question_examples: Any sudden severe pain going through to your back?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No sudden tearing pain into my back, and my breathing is okay — it's the stuck feeling and the burning that are the problem.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone and is very anxious about the choking sensation
trigger_question_examples: Is anyone with you at home?
How are you coping right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I live on my own and I'm really frightened — it feels like I'm choking on it.
